description: Renders a text label in 3D space with fade-in animation
utility: Display a text label at a specific position in 3D space

arguments.name: position_x
arguments.description: X coordinate of the label position

arguments.name: position_y
arguments.description: Y coordinate of the label position

arguments.name: position_z
arguments.description: Z coordinate of the label position

alternates.description: Use a point3d expression instead of separate coordinates
Place label at the end point of a vector3d expression
Label with perpendicular offset using buff()

examples.scenario: Label angle theta at origin in scalar triple product
examples.expression: G=g3d(at(1,8), view(22.1, 22.8)); O = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0); label3d(G, O, "theta")
